CVE-2019-17263.title: In libyal libfwsi before 20191006, libfwsi_extension_block_copy_f ...
CVE-2019-17263.description: In libyal libfwsi before 20191006, libfwsi_extension_block_copy_from_byte_stream in libfwsi_extension_block.c has a heap-based buffer over-read because rejection of an unsupported size only considers values less than 6, even though values of 6 and 7 are also unsupported. NOTE: the vendor has disputed this as described in the GitHub issue

CVE-2019-17264.title: In libyal liblnk before 20191006, liblnk_location_information_rea ...
CVE-2019-17264.description: In libyal liblnk before 20191006, liblnk_location_information_read_data in liblnk_location_information.c has a heap-based buffer over-read because an incorrect variable name is used for a certain offset. NOTE: the vendor has disputed this as described in the GitHub issue

CVE-2019-17401.title: libyal liblnk 20191006 has a heap-based buffer over-read in the n ...
CVE-2019-17401.description: libyal liblnk 20191006 has a heap-based buffer over-read in the network_share_name_offset>20 code block of liblnk_location_information_read_data in liblnk_location_information.c, a different issue than CVE-2019-17264. NOTE: the vendor has disputed this as described in the GitHub issue
